02 / The Process

FROM MODELLING
to road.

A process of design iteration and modelling to define the design language needed to make the car unique yet respectful to this icons DNA.

Phase I
Complete

Dismantle & Scan

Donor car fully dismantled by classic-RS specialists. Every part catalogued, photographed, and scanned. A complete 3D digital twin created with T3DMC.

  • Build ledger
  • Component archive
  • Digital twin v1
Phase II
In progress

Baseline & Design

Chassis aligned and prepared by Coventry Metalcraft. Composite tooling, CAD surfacing, aero simulation. Engine rebuild commences at Mahle.

  • Surfacing CAD
  • Aero CFD package
  • Tooling production
Phase III
Upcoming

Assembly & Drive

Final assembly at the Digital Manufacturing Centre, Silverstone. Trim, electronics, calibration. First drive. Hand-over to the syndicate.

  • Final assembly
  • Shake-down testing
  • Hand-over event
03Methodology

Built with
discipline.

  1. 01
    Catalogue
    Every component photographed, weighed, scanned and assigned a unique identifier.
  2. 02
    Decide
    Restore, replace or remanufacture — assessed by an independent technical committee.
  3. 03
    Document
    Decisions written into the build ledger and shared quarterly with custodians.
  4. 04
    Drive
    The finished car is tested, validated and handed over with a full provenance dossier.
